warnings: MET emits observation only. CDE is the sole control authority; SEL is the sole enforcement authority.
Compliance per leg reflects whether an artifact-backed record was found, not whether the upstream owner has approved or enforced.

When evidence for a leg is absent, the leg is reported as 'missing' rather than 'unknown' if the underlying loop is repo-mutating; pure read-only flows that do not require the leg may report 'unknown'.
failure_prevented: AI programming work being treated as governed even when one or more core-loop legs (AEX, PQX, EVL, TPA, CDE, SEL) lack artifact-backed evidence.
signal_improved: Per-leg compliance signal (present | partial | missing | unknown) and a single compliance_score so the dashboard can render BLOCK when a repo-mutating leg is missing.
next_recommended_input: Emit AEX intake and PQX execution records for AEX-PQX-DASH-02 and forward to EVL and CDE for evaluation and adjudication; do not promote until core_loop_complete is true.
